changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/components/mod.rs:1226-1228

The doc comment for `AvpHooks` reads:

```
/// Installs/removes AVP (Agent Validator Protocol) hooks in Claude Code settings.
///
/ Delegates to `avp_common::install` — the same logic used by `avp init`.
```

The third line uses a single `/` instead of `///`. This means the last sentence is not rendered as a doc comment — it becomes a plain line comment and is invisible in `cargo doc` output.

Suggestion: Change `/ Delegates to` to `/// Delegates to`.

Verification: `cargo doc -p swissarmyhammer-cli` renders the full doc comment for `AvpHooks`."
nit: AvpHooks doc comment has a missing leading slash on the continuation line
